notes: Extremely bare-bones implementation: barrels don't properly traverse girders (they mostly fall off), ladder climbing is glitchy with no proper ground-to-ladder transition, girder collision is unreliable, no hammer mechanic, no proper sprite art (just colored rectangles), and the win condition is poorly defined, making the game barely playable.
The build runs, but key handling is partially broken due to mismatched key names, gameplay is very incomplete versus Donkey Kong, and the visuals are only a rough abstract approximation.
